channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wooden pallets and waste being fly tipped, 7th April
item.description:
Wooden pallets and waste being fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been parked outside 72 Froissart Road for a few months now with flat tyres, 7th April
item.description:
As above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Froissart Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New fly tip or garden waste, 7th April
item.description:
Dumped by a nearby resident, into the land and onto the road. Garden waste, including a shed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Grove Street, Deptford, Lewisham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily fly tipping at this location, 7th April
item.description:
Daily fly tipping at this location

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Mattress dumped, 7th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th April
item.description:
Bins have now been taken away but they left all the rubbish surrounding it due to overflowing bins as they weren’t emptied for so long!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121a, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and carboard dumped on the street, 7th April
item.description:
This appeared about a week ago just after the council had cleared up another pile of dumped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Anne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders Waste bags and Rats!, 7th April
item.description:
Waste dumped here for over a week now! Rat infestation in buildings. Disgusting. Needs to be removed ASAP. Trip hazard as well. Outside 24 Local Shop on corner of talbot Yard and Borough High Street. Need removal asap!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Yard, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping usual location, 7th April
item.description:
Fly tipping blocks pavement safety issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defective vehicles advertising they are for sale, or contact details to buy vehicles., 7th April
item.description:
Both vehicles are undrivable. The silver car has 2 offside flat tyres and is being advertised for sale. The red car's front offside wheel appears to have folded out and is defective. This vehicle has stickers on it advertising to buy motor vehicles. Both are parked within one space of each other on Danson Road. Both vehicles are taking up valuable parking spaces for those who use Danson park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping opposite pagoda mews, 7th April
item.description:
Lots of builders refuse dumped on ravens way opposite the pagoda mews turning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravens Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tip on ravens way, 7th April
item.description:
Lots of rubbish and what looks like builder’s refuse has been dumped on the corner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravens Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Safety barriers missing., 7th April
item.description:
Half the safety barriers have been removed from the refuge island in the middle of the pelican crossing. There are lumps of metal sticking up where the railings where which could be a trip hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham High Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two abandoned brown bins full of rubbish, 7th April
item.description:
Brown bins with rubbish in them abandoned by the side of Jubilee School.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Filey Avenue, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass, 7th April
item.description:
Smashed glass has been here for several days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friern Barnet Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours have started dumping their rubbish up against our pub railings. We had this same problem last year., 7th April
item.description:
It will attract rats and flies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 237, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of dumped furniture, 7th April
item.description:
Unsightly and encouraging more dumping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peacock Yard, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping into skip overflowing into road causing a danger to traffic, 7th April

Fly tipping into skip now overflowing into road causing a danger to traffic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yester Road, Elmstead, Greater London
